title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra grab new certifications ahead of imminent unveiling
description: Yesterday was filled with a barrage of Motorola leaked renders, showing the Razr 70, Razr 70 Ultra, and the Edge 70 Pro. Today, the Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra have been spotted in two separate certification databases. The Razr 70 Ultra with the model number XT2655-4 has been given the go-ahead in China by 3C. The certification reveals that it will have support for 68W wired charging. Incidentally, that's the same level as the Razr 60 Ultra, so there's no upgrade in this regard on the newer model. Meanwhile, the Edge 70 Pro with the model number XT2607-1 has bagged the TDRA...

title: YouTube Premium gets even more expensive
description: YouTube Premium has just become even more expensive in the US. The price hike has already taken effect for new subscribers, while existing ones will see it in early June. The individual plan is now $15.99 per month or $159.99 per year, up from $13.99 and $139.99, respectively. The family plan is now $26.99 per month, up from $22.99. The student plan is $8.99, up from $7.99. The recently relaunched YouTube Premium Lite jumped to $8.99 per month too, from $7.99. While the full Premium experience removes ads, lets you play videos in the background, enables downloads, and lets you...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 CAD-based renders leak showing a familiar design
description: Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z Flip8 has now been outed in some CAD-based renders showing it from a bunch of angles. It follows in the footsteps of its bigger sibling, the Galaxy Z Fold8, which leaked in CAD-based renders last month. The Flip8 will measure 166.8 x 75.4 x 6.6 mm when unfolded and 85.4 x 75.4 x 13.2 mm when folded. That makes it a tiny bit longer, wider, and thicker than its predecessor from last year when unfolded, but we do mean a tiny bit - you won't notice any change in real life. That said, it will be half a mm thinner when folded, for what it's worth. The Flip8...

title: Gemini gains the ability to create interactive simulations
description: The latest Gemini feature lets Google's AI generate interactive simulations and models. With this, Gemini can transform your questions and complex topics into custom visualizations directly within the chat. In the past, Gemini would mostly respond to such queries with text with static diagrams. Now, it delivers functional simulations that help you better understand the topic you're inquiring about. Examples Google gives include "rotating a molecule or simulating a complex physics system", or "exploring how the moon orbits the Earth". You can manually adjust options to see...

title: Samsung's upcoming foldables may get this AI feature
description: According to a new report, Samsung is going to deliver Scam Detection from the get-go on the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Flip8, and the "Wide Fold", whatever its actual commercial name ends up being. This was revealed through code inside the latest beta version of the Phone by Google app, which suggests the Gemini-powered feature is expanding to Samsung's next-gen foldables. Currently, Scam Detection only works in the US, but Samsung may be looking to expand its geographical footprint too. The mentions of the upcoming foldables inside the code in the Phone by Google app...

title: vivo X300 FE tipped to get a 200mm teleconverter in India
description: The vivo X300 FE, which quietly debuted in Russia early last month, is expected to arrive in India in the coming weeks. A recent leak revealed a new green color option, and a new one now suggests that the device could support a teleconverter kit in the country. According to the leak, vivo will sell a telephoto extender kit for the vivo X300 FE in India. The kit will include a case as well as a 200mm teleconverter lens. The vivo X300 Pro and its 200mm teleconverter kit The lens will offer 2.35x of extended optical zoom, similar to the 200mm teleconverter available for the vivo X300...

title: Huawei Pura 90 Pro series launch date and design revealed
description: Huawei has finally confirmed the launch date for its Pura 90 Pro series in China, while also revealing the phones’ design, color options, and RAM/storage configs. The lineup will include the Pura 90 Pro and Pura 90 Pro Max. The Huawei Pura 90 series is set to be unveiled in China on April 20. Interested buyers can already pre-order the devices via Huawei’s official online store in the country. While the specifications are yet to be confirmed, Huawei has revealed the design, color options, and RAM and storage configurations for both phones. Huawei Pura 90 Pro Max and Pura 90...

title: Instagram now lets you edit comments after posting
description: Instagram has announced a new feature that finally lets users edit comments after posting, with the caveat that users only have a 15-minute window to do so. After that, they cannot edit their comments. Another catch is you can only edit the text in the comments, so, for instance, if a comment has both text and a photo, you can only edit the text. Instagram users now can edit comments after posting However, on the plus side, there's no limit to the number of times you can edit a comment on Instagram within 15 minutes of posting it. But it's worth noting that once a comment is...

title: Huawei Enjoy 90m Plus goes official
description: Huawei's Enjoy 90 series includes three smartphones - Enjoy 90, Enjoy 90 Plus, and Enjoy 90 Pro Max. These are now joined by the Enjoy 90m Plus, which has been listed on Huawei's official website. The Huawei Enjoy 90m Plus is built around a 6.67" HD+ 120Hz LCD with a centered punch hole for the 8MP selfie camera. On the back is a single 50MP camera with f/1.8 aperture and 10x digital zoom. Powering the Huawei Enjoy 90m Plus is the Kirin 8000 SoC. Huawei hasn't revealed the RAM details yet, but the Chinese brand confirmed that the Enjoy 90m Plus has two storage options - 128GB and...

title: CMF Phone 3 Pro's key specifications leaked
description: If Nothing sticks to its usual launch timeline, the CMF Phone 3 Pro could arrive in the coming weeks, considering the Phone 2 Pro debuted on April 28 last year. While the brand has yet to share any official details, a new leak has revealed the key specifications of the upcoming phone. According to the leak, the CMF Phone 3 Pro will switch to a Qualcomm chipset this year, and is expected to be powered by the Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 SoC, replacing the MediaTek Dimensity 7300 Pro used in its predecessor. CMF Phone 2 Pro The display size remains unknown, but the phone is said to feature an...

title: Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 are now on sale in the US
description: The Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57, unveiled last month, are now on sale in the US and can be purchased through Samsung's official US website. The Samsung Galaxy A57 comes in a lone Awesome Navy color with two memory options - 8GB/128GB and 8GB/256GB, priced at $550 (€470/INR51,010) and $610 (€520/INR56,575), respectively. Samsung Galaxy A57 The Samsung Galaxy A37, on the other hand, is available in two colors - Awesome Lavender and Awesome Charcoal. Its base model, priced at $450 (€385/INR41,735), has 6GB of RAM and 128GB of storage. But there's also a version with 8GB RAM...

title: Samsung Galaxy A37 review
Spotify will let you easily turn off video content across all devices
description: Spotify is introducing new video controls, which basically let you fully switch off video content in the app. This will start rolling out globally later this month and will apply to all accounts, including free ones. You'll be able to go to Settings > Content and display where you will find options to switch off Canvas looping visuals, as well as videos for music or podcasts. Once you have chosen a new preference, it will be remembered across mobile, desktop, web, TV - wherever you use Spotify. You'll still get video ads if you're on the free plan, and Canvas-like visuals on some...

title: Samsung is boosting Galaxy S26 and Galaxy S26 Ultra production
description: According to a new report from Korea, Samsung is raising production for the Galaxy S26 series this month. The company initially planned to manufacture a total of 2.4 million units in April, of which 800,000 would be the S26, 300,000 would be the S26+, and 1.3 million would be the S26 Ultra. [#InlinePriceWidget,14456,1#] [#InlinePriceWidget,14457,1#] [#InlinePriceWidget,14320,1#] However, it seems like the Galaxy S26 is a surprise hit, the S26 Ultra is selling a tiny bit better than expected, and the S26+ is selling less than Samsung would want. The new, updated production numbers...

title: Motorola Razr 70 renders leak too
description: Today has been filled with Motorola leaks - the Motorola Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra both got portrayed in official-looking renders, and now it's time for the 'vanilla' Razr 70 to get the same treatment. The Razr 70 will be offered in four colors, allegedly, but we only have three to look at today: Pantone Sporting Green, Pantone Hematite, and Pantone Violet Ice. Motorola Razr 70 in Pantone Sporting Green The phone looks like the Razr 60 it's going to replace. The Razr 70 is rumored to come with a 6.9-inch 1080x2640 inner folding screen and a 3.63-inch 1056x1066 cover...

title: Honor's new video teaser for the 600 and 600 Pro showcases their design
description: Honor is continuing its teaser campaign for the upcoming Honor 600 and Honor 600 Pro. The brand's global X account has posted the quick video you can see embedded below, which portrays both devices in a whiteish colorway. Ready for its close-up. ✨Get an exclusive first look at the elegant curves and stunning details of the HONOR 600. The countdown begins! pic.twitter.com/QuJBTEDbyB— HONOR (@Honorglobal) April 9, 2026 The Honor 600 and 600 Pro devices are being fully unveiled on April 23, when they will join the already launched Honor 600 Lite. The Honor 600 is powered by the Snapdragon...

title: New Motorola Razr 70 Ultra press renders are here
description: CAD renders of the upcoming Motorola Razr 70 Ultra surfaced late last month, revealing the clamshell foldable in a silver shade. Now, a new set of press renders has surfaced online, showcasing the phone in two new color options. The leaked press renders showcase the Razr 70 Ultra in Orient Blue Alcantara and Pantone Cocoa Wood finishes. The former appears to feature a faux leather rear panel, while the latter adopts a matte wooden texture. A closer look at the images reveals the absence of a selfie camera on the inner folding display. This is likely an oversight, as earlier CAD...

title: Oppo Find X9 Ultra full camera details officially confirmed, design leaks
description: The Oppo Find X9 Ultra is set to debut in China and global markets on April 21. Ahead of the launch, Oppo has revealed the phone’s full camera specifications, while its design and other key specs have surfaced via a China Telecom listing. Oppo recently confirmed that the Find X9 Ultra will feature a 50MP periscope telephoto camera with 10x optical zoom, and has now revealed the rest of the device’s camera specs through a social media post. It will feature a 200MP primary sensor with an almost 1-inch size, said to deliver 10% better light intake than the Find X8 Ultra. The phone will...

title: Ai+ PulseTab arrives with 10.95” LCD and 8,000mAh battery
description: Alongside a trio of new smartphones, Ai+ also unveiled its first tablet. PulseTab brings entry-level specs, a 10.95-inch LCD and an 8,000mAh battery. It boots nxtQ OS based on Android 16 and will be available in India from May. PulseTab is built around a 10.95-inch IPS LCD with FHD+ resolution and a 90Hz refresh rate. The panel is rated at up to 400 nits peak brightness and is flanked by quad speakers. PulseTab features a 13MP rear camera and an 8MP front-facing shooter. It is equipped with MediaTek’s Helio G88 chipset paired with 6GB RAM and 128GB storage. You also get support for...

title: Here's when Samsung might unveil its 2026 Galaxy foldables
description: Samsung unveiled the Galaxy S26 series smartphones in February, and the next big smartphone announcement from the Korean brand is expected to be the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Flip8, and a wide foldable, which could be called Galaxy Z Fold Wide (or Fold8 Wide). There's no word from Samsung on the launch dates of these foldables, but according to Korea Economic TV, they will be unveiled on July 22. Korea Economic TV reports that these Galaxy foldables will be unveiled at a Galaxy Unpacked event in London, UK, without specifying the event time. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8's leaked CAD-based...
